title: Dendrobium stella-silvae
taxonomy: Dendrobium stella-silvae is classified as a species of orchid, specifically in the family Orchidaceae. This classification is further broken down into the genus Dendrobium, which contains approximately 1,500 species of orchids. The species Dendrobium stella-silvae is native to the Philippines and is known for its unique and exotic appearance. It is also sometimes referred to as a terrestrial orchid, due to its ability to grow on the forest floor. The classification of Dendrobium stella-silvae is of great interest to botanists and orchid enthusiasts due to its distinctive characteristics.
